summary: Merge review: 75 staged files from origin/main merged into worktree branch. Both sides independently reviewed and committed before merge. Conflict resolution quality is high: .test-index properly combines new test entries without duplication; CLAUDE.md documentation updates add agent routing table entries for scope-drift-reviewer and intent-search enhancements; new agent file (scope-drift-reviewer.md) integrates with established contract patterns; intent-search.md extended with INTENT_CONFLICT signal and caller traversal Step 7b; sprint SKILL.md augmented with three-tier SC coverage gates (haiku→sonnet→opus). All referenced files exist (scope-drift-reviewer agent, three SC-coverage prompts, eight new tests). No unmerged conflicts, no whitespace issues, no broken cross-references. Merge is ready for commit. security_overlay_warranted: no, performance_overlay_warranted: no
